transcript.narrator_intro: Listen to a conversation between a woman and a man.

dialogue.speaker: F1
dialogue.text: Did you finally get your new student ID card?

dialogue.speaker: M1
dialogue.text: Yes. The registrar's office emailed me yesterday that it was ready to pick up.

transcript.question_intro: How did the man know his ID card was ready?

questions.prompt: How did the man know his ID card was ready?

choices.text: He received an email from the registrar's office.
He saw a notice in the library.
The professor announced it in class.

questions.explanation: The registrar's office emailed him that the card was ready.
questions.evidence: The registrar's office emailed me yesterday that it was ready to pick up.
